entry.title: New IDC FA810517D0002 awarded to KELLY AVIATION CENTER, L.P for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::CT::IGF KC-10 ENGINE CONTRACTOR LOGISTICS SUPPORT

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- ENGINES, TURBINES, AND COMPONENTS

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
